recent_announcements.company: E To E Transportation Infrastructure Limited
recent_announcements.summary: E To E Transportation Infrastructure Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'E To E Transportation Infrastructure Limited has been declared as the lowest bidder (L1) by North Eastern Railway for Design, Programming, Installation, Supply, Testing and Commissioning of Bansgaon Station, Piprauli Station, Khajani Station & Unwal Station electronic interlocking (EI) system (centralized type) conforming to RDSO/SPN/192/2019 Ver. 2 or latest (with latest amendment if any) for Piprauli, Khajani, Unwal and Bansgaon stations, as per SIP along with indoor & outdoor work and telecom work in Sahjanwa-Bansgaon section (including Maghar-Piprauli Y-connection) including part supply of materials at Sahjanwa-Bansgaon new line section of Sahjanwa Dohrighat new line of LJN/BSB Division of N.E. Railway'. |SUBJECT: Updates
